name: Hélène est dans mon Ventre.
short_description: You follow a troubled girl whose only friend is her talking tapeworm inside her belly. This one will help and advise her in order for her to get closer to the person she loves.
detailed_description:
You follow a troubled girl whose only friend is her talking tapeworm inside her belly.
This one will help and advise her in order for her to get closer to the person she loves.

Live the experience of being friends with your tapeworm !
Live the experience of a completely disturbed love !
Live the experience of catastrophic and dissociative depression !

A single-ending Visual Novel, containing elements of horror, psychological horror, and gore.

Contains sexual violence.
Not recommended for emetophobics.
